# Security.ToolOutputHasControlSequences method

Returns `true` when *text* contains a control sequence a sanitized output MUST NOT carry (spec R-28.3-i).

```csharp
public static bool ToolOutputHasControlSequences(string text)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| text | The text to inspect. |

## Return Value

`true` when a stripped control character is present.
